### PR Description

_What does this PR do?_

---

### PR Nature

_Select the type of PR by checking the appropriate box._

- [ ] **Hotfix** (urgent fix for critical, breaking bugs)
- [ ] **Bugfix** (non-breaking change that resolves an issue)
- [ ] **New Feature** (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] **Breaking Change** (fix or feature that may cause existing functionality to behave differently)
- [ ] **Refactor** (improvements to code structure, readability, or performance without changing functionality)

---

### Miscellaneous Checks

_Confirm the following checks are completed before submitting the PR._

- [ ] **No package changes** (No new packages installed or existing packages modified)
- [ ] **Dev Sanity** (Code has been tested locally and meets development standards)

---

### DB Query Plan (if applicable)

- **Query/endpoint:**
- **EXPLAIN ANALYZE:** (attach screenshot of execution plan)
- **Checks:**
  - [ ] Index used?
  - [ ] Sequential scan present?
  - [ ] Batching applied?
  - [ ] Pagination/limits applied?
  - [ ] N+1 queries avoided?
- **Proposed optimizations:**
  - Index changes:

---

### Additional Information

**Screenshots / Loom Video** (if applicable):  
_Attach screenshots or a Loom video if the PR includes UI changes._

**Monitoring dashboard URL** (if applicable):  
_Datadog or sentry or any relevant monitoring tool URL_
